zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gervase Clifton於1412年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Sir Gervase Clifton16歲，母親Isabel Francis25歲。他於大約1437年與Isabel Herbert Finch結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年5月6日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年59歲，埋葬在英國肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gervase Clifton于1412年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Sir Gervase Clifton16岁，母亲Isabel Francis25岁。他于大约1437年与Isabel Herbert Finch结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年5月6日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年59岁，埋葬在英国肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gervase Clifton was born in 1412, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Gervase Clifton, was 16 and his mother, Isabel Francis, was 25. He married Isabel Herbert Finch about 1437. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 May 1471, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gervase Clifton est né en 1412, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gervase Clifton, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Isabel Francis, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Herbert Finch environ 1437. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1471, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gervase Clifton 1412 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gervase Clifton 16 und seine Mutter Isabel Francis 25. Er hat um 1437 Isabel Herbert Finch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1471 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervase Clifton è nato il nel 1412 nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Gervase Clifton, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Francis, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Herbert Finch circa 1437. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1471, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Brabourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gervase Cliftonが1412年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Gervase Cliftonは16歳，母Isabel Francisは25歳であった。約1437年にIsabel Herbert Finchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年5月6日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gervase Clifton(이)가 1412년 영국 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gervase Clifton(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Francis(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1437년 Isabel Herbert Finch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gervase Clifton nasceu em 1412, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Gervase Clifton, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Francis, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Herbert Finch aproximadamente 1437. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1471, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gervase Clifton родился в 1412 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gervase Clifton было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Francis, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Herbert Finch около 1437 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 мая 1471 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gervase Clifton nació en 1412, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Gervase Clifton, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Isabel Francis, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel Herbert Finch aproximadamente 1437. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1471, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
